response_200.description:
User profile with plan capabilities and quota status.

Returned by /api/me endpoint to provide frontend with all
necessary plan information for UI rendering.

allow_network_analytics.description: NETINT-001/006: User consent for anonymized network analytics collection. NULL = undecided (treated as opt-out), true = opted in, false = opted out.
allow_network_analytics.title: Allow Network Analytics

consulting_discount_pct.description: Consultoria discount % granted to this founder (default 50 for v2_lifetime). NULL = no consulting discount.
consulting_discount_pct.title: Consulting Discount Pct

days_since_failure.description: STORY-309: Days since first payment failure (null if no failure)
days_since_failure.title: Days Since Failure

dunning_phase.description: STORY-309: Dunning phase — healthy, active_retries, grace_period, blocked
dunning_phase.title: Dunning Phase

founder_checkout_source.description: utm_source or checkout source param from founding checkout metadata.
founder_checkout_source.title: Founder Checkout Source

founder_offer_version.description: Offer version string from checkout metadata (e.g. 'v2_lifetime').
founder_offer_version.title: Founder Offer Version

founder_since.description: Timestamp of checkout.session.completed for the lifetime purchase.
founder_since.title: Founder Since

is_founder.description: TRUE if user purchased the v2 lifetime Plano Fundadores (R$997). NOT set for v1 subscription founders (-50% monthly).
is_founder.title: Is Founder

last_login_at.description: LIFECYCLE-001: Timestamp do último login bem-sucedido do usuário. NULL se nunca logou.
last_login_at.title: Last Login At

login_count.description: LIFECYCLE-001: Contador total de logins bem-sucedidos.
login_count.title: Login Count

quota_reset_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of next quota reset
quota_reset_date.title: Quota Reset Date

subscription_end_date.description: ISO 8601 — data real de renovação Stripe (current_period_end), null para trial/admin
subscription_end_date.title: Subscription End Date

trial_expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when trial expires (if applicable)
trial_expires_at.title: Trial Expires At

response_200.title: UserProfileResponse
